software_development.label: Software Development
software_development.description: Skills for development workflows, CI/CD, code review, and project management

productivity.label: Productivity
productivity.description: Skills for meeting capture, session management, and workflow productivity

agent_tools.label: Agent Tools
agent_tools.description: Skills that give agents human-like capabilities such as web browsing, interaction, and automation

headless-claude-code.description: CLI conventions and invocation patterns for running Claude Code headlessly via claude -p. Provides universal invocation template, timeout/turn conventions, session management, and stream relay pattern for live output visibility.

dev-plan.description: Development planning skill. Explores the codebase, generates structured dev plans, commits to dev-plans/, and opens draft PRs for review. Supports revision loops and abort.

dev-implement.description: Development implementation skill. Takes an approved dev plan, implements via claude -p, opens a draft PR, and runs review cycles (CI triage, PR review triage, coverage) until everything is green.

opencode-configuration.description: Skill for configuring OpenCode with GLM and MiniMax providers. Teaches agents how to create and manage opencode.json, agent definitions, and provider configurations.

intermediary-delivery.description: Fire-and-forget outbound message delivery for orchestrator-level communication. Provides shell scripts for sending text messages and files via Telegram. Used by orchestrators for status updates between subprocess calls and artifact delivery after subprocess exit.

meeting-mode.description: Meeting capture skill with natural language classification. Haiku 4.5 classifies messages and routes them — passive capture, notes, action items, research queries, synthesis. No prefix triggers needed.

agent-browser-init.description: Install agent-browser as a standalone binary in an Alpine Linux sandbox. Run once after sandbox initialization before using any other agent-browser-* skills.
